declared.title: Rwanda: Freedom on the Net 2025 Country Report
declared.selection_rationale: Confirmed live via direct fetch, 2026-07-20 (real page title matched: "Rwanda: Freedom on the Net 2025 Country Report", coverage period "June 1, 2024 - May 31, 2025"). Fourth Rwanda data point. Coverage-contribution value: documents coordinated pro-government inauthentic-behavior networks (AI-generated content) targeting critics around the July 2024 election and, notably, a March 2025 diplomatic-rift-driven harassment campaign against Belgian officials by the same network -- a genuinely new finding not covered by the existing 2024 chapter (which only covers through May 2024, before the election). Full content not yet read in detail; specific findings to be logged at semantic review.
